name: munjanggun-blog
description: 문장군 블로그 SEO 콘텐츠 운영 파이프라인

scripts.check: node --check scripts/track_ranking.js && node --check scripts/analyze_top10.js && node --check scripts/fetch_keyword_data.js && node --check scripts/fetch_keyword_data_product.js && node --check scripts/generate_dashboard.js && node --check scripts/generate_mock_history.js && node --check scripts/normalize_keyword_outputs.js && node --check scripts/render_strategy_docs.js && node --check scripts/lib/brand_claim_rules.js && node --check scripts/lib/public_safety.js && node --check scripts/lib/post_validation_policy.js && node --check scripts/lib/posting_registry.js && node --check scripts/lib/naver_blog_results.js && node --check scripts/validate_post.js && node --check scripts/blog_quality_gate.js && node --check scripts/blog_risk_scan.js && node --check scripts/validate_data_schema.js && node --check scripts/check_freshness.js && node --check scripts/validate_daily_report.js && node --check scripts/validate_topic_scorecard.js && node --check scripts/validate_active_queue.js && node --check scripts/summarize_ranking_changes.js && node --check tests/validate_project_structure.js && node --check tests/validate_automation_rules.js && node --check tests/test_env_loader.js && node --check tests/test_naver_blog_results.js && node --check tests/test_posting_registry.js && node --check tests/test_public_safety.js && node --check tests/test_validate_post.js && node --check tests/test_blog_quality_gate.js && node --check tests/test_blog_risk_scan.js && node --check tests/test_ops_daily_contract.js && node --check tests/test_validate_active_queue.js
scripts.validate: npm run check && node tests/validate_project_structure.js && node tests/validate_automation_rules.js && npm run render:strategy:check && npm run validate:data && npm run check:freshness && npm run test:env-loader && npm run test:ranking-url && npm run test:posting-registry && npm run test:public-safety && npm run test:validate-post && npm run test:blog-gate && npm run test:blog-risk && npm run test:ops-daily && npm run test:active-queue
scripts.validate:local: npm run validate && npm run validate:posts
scripts.ops:daily: node scripts/validate_daily_report.js --latest --max-age-days=2 --require-topic-portfolio && node scripts/validate_active_queue.js --latest-daily && node scripts/validate_topic_scorecard.js --latest --allow-missing=warn && npm run check:freshness
scripts.ops:weekly: npm run track && npm run analyze && npm run ranking:summary && node scripts/check_freshness.js --weekly
